property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, and your opponent has a Battleground or Location in play, this attack cannot be stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, and you have more than 3 anger, this attack cannot be stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 6 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, and your opponent is at 5 stages above 0 or higher, this attack cannot be stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, and if your opponent has a Drill in play, this attack cannot be stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, and if you have no Non-Combat cards in play, this attack cannot be stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 6 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, and if your Main Personality is at 0, this attack cannot be stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing +1 life card for every card in your hand. If you declared a Saiyan Tokui-Waza this must be the first attack that you play during Combat. Discard a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, in place of an attack, you may draw 2 cards after you have taken 10 or more life cards of damage during this Combat. You can only have 1 copy of this Drill in play at a time.

property.name: Text
property.value: If you declared a non-Saiyan, non-Black Tokui-Waza all of your attacks do +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, name a card. That card cannot be played for the remainder of Combat. Discard 1 life card when you name the card. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza shuffle the top or bottom card of your discard pile into your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, gain 4 power stages. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza power up to full. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If Goku is in play, it stays on the table to be used 2 more times this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. Your opponent gains 1 anger. This card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage for every anger level you are above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. If your opponent has 3 or more anger he must discard a card from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If used by Goku, and if your declared a Tokui-Waza, this card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever your opponent stops 1 of your attacks you lose 2 power stages. All of your attacks deal +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza gain 1 anger. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If used by Tien or Yamcha do +4 power stages instead. This card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat.
